◎简　　介  

　　SAG DU ES MIR - YOU TELL ME is an interlaced anthology film about victims and offenders and the truth that lays between the lies.After 20 years Moni returns back home to her Sister Silke who has been attacked by a stranger. Moni is willing to do anything possible to find the attacker and to protect her sister. But is that what Silke really wants? And if so, who is actually the...
